title: Delightful Polish Steak Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful dish that combines the richness of polish sausage with the savory taste of steak, all in a delicious stir-fry.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, until translucent.
Add the sliced bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the polish sausage and cook for 2-3 minutes, until browned.
Add the steak and cook for 3-4 minutes, until browned.
Add the stir-fry sauce and stir to coat the ingredients.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
